title: senecio coymolachensis
intro: Senecio coymolachensis, also known as the "Mountain Ragwort," is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Senecio coymolachensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues. Senecio coymolachensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
